prompt: Create a warm, intimate photorealistic bedroom scene at night featuring a young adult woman with shoulder-length light brown hair reclining sideways on a white bed beside exactly 1 ginger tabby kitten. The woman wears exactly 2 visible clothing pieces: a plain white sleeveless tank top and dark navy shorts. Her face is deliberately obscured by a solid medium-brown square privacy block centered over the face, with no facial features visible. She lies on her left side, propped slightly on one arm, gently holding a thin string toy near the kitten; the kitten rests against her torso on the rumpled white duvet, looking toward the camera with alert eyes. The room has soft beige walls, a blurred headboard or wall panel on the left, white pillows on the right, and exactly 1 warm bedside lamp glowing behind them, creating cozy golden ambient light and shallow depth of field. Use a vertical 3:4 composition, natural DSLR-style photography, soft focus background, realistic skin, fabric folds, kitten fur detail, warm color grading, quiet bedtime mood, no text, no watermark, no extra people or animals.
